name: VSGO V-B03-E Falcon-S Outdoor Air Blower
description: VSGO Falcon-S air blower can hung outside to save the space inside of the bag.

features.Key Features :: Portable：Hung outside to save the space inside the bag. | Non-tacky: Elastic cloth to prevent electrostatic adsorption. | Convenient: Magnetic buckle for easy one-handed operation. | Dustproof: Third generation filter can prevent rain and dust. | Multi-purpose: Two replaceable nozzles of different lengths for different cleaning needs
features.What's in The Box :: 1 x Falcon-S Outdoor air blower | 1 x Long nozzle | 1 x Short nozzle
